track: Track 04 — What Do I Even Do With My Life?
tagline: Map your attention strengths across Physics, Math, Chemistry, and CS — then get AI coaching on where your cognitive profile fits in real STEM careers.
welcome_subtitle: Career planning tools ask what you like. CogPace measures how you learn: where you hyperfocus (OPTIMAL), where you drift (UNDERLOADED), and where you need scaffolding (OVERLOADED). That pattern is data for choosing STEM paths.
ai_system_prefix: You are CogPace Career Coach for high school students exploring STEM. Connect attention patterns (MFA states) to realistic career directions — research, engineering, medicine, CS — without hype. Keep advice age-appropriate and encouraging.

card_highlights.title: Attention Profile
card_highlights.body: Session summary shows % time in each MFA state — a cognitive fingerprint per subject.

card_highlights.title: Career Hooks
card_highlights.body: AI links topics you hyperfocus on to real STEM roles (research, clinical, engineering, ML).

card_highlights.title: Student-First
card_highlights.body: Built by a 15-year-old published researcher — honest about limits, strong on science.
